creator: dclarke@blastwave.org
text:
(In reply to Andrew "RhodiumToad" Gierth from comment #1)


Thank you. I guess one can not really use an old machine tucked away in
a corner somewhere to run poudriere and expect Rust to build. 

This morning I see on the output : 

[17:25:40] Failed ports: graphics/librsvg2-rust:build lang/gnat12:build lang/gcc12:build

I will try graphics/librsvg2-rust by itself and see what happens.

Otherwise a machine with 64G of mem and a stack of Xeon cores is going
to be needed. I really do not know.
